title: potentilla × buseri
intro: Potentilla × buseri, also known as cinquefoil or silver cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, due to its flavonoids and phenolic acids content. Potentilla × buseri can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
